title: Herman Ese'ese
description: New Zealand and Samoa international rugby league footballer
extract:
Herman Ese'ese (born 7 September 1994) is a professional rugby league footballer who plays as a prop and loose forward for Hull FC in the Super League. He has also played for both New Zealand and Samoa at international level.
He previously played for the Canterbury-Bankstown Bulldogs, Brisbane Broncos, Newcastle Knights, Gold Coast Titans and the Dolphins in the NRL in Australia.
